titleStmt.title: SII 10.563: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 563. (A.R. No. 395 of 1926.) ON A SLAB PLANTED IN FRONT OF THE RUINED TEMPLE OF VASANTARĀYA ON THE HILL, KOTTŪR BEZWADA TALUK, KRISHNA DISTRICT. Ś. 1312. (Pramādi)

summary.p: States that Kumāragiri-Reḍḍi granted certain lands and also a certain quantity of grain in several villages to the temple of Vasantarāya Narasiṁha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
rāyavasaṁttavallabhasya .
Āsīnō maṁddarādrā vabhinutanikhilōni
tyasatyaprakāśa śrīvālmīki prabhāvaprakaṭitamahi
mō dāttavakṣasthalaśrī bibhrāṇa ścakraśaṁkhā ca
varavaradāṁ nbāhu ruhēmaratkai ravyādvaḥ padma
yōniḥ prabhṛtinuragaṇaiḥ pūjyalakṣmīnṛsiṁhya . śau¨ryya
nidhi ¨rvirōdhimastakatalaṁ nyastāṁghrirū¨rjasvalō lōkā
lōkadarīgṛhāṁttaranaṭa(kti)tkī¨rtti ¨rvibhābhāskara . pautrō vē
madharādhipasya tanaya śrīyanna vōtaprabhō [¨rjīyā]
dāravibhaṁ kumāragiribhūpālō nṛpālōttama .
svasti śrīśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1312 Agu nēṁṭi pramādi
puṣyamā makarasaṁkrāṁttipuṇyakālamaṁdu vasaṁtta
rāyanṛharē prādāṁ nkumāragiri bhūpatiḥ
sasyā¨rththamēkaṁ gōca¨rma ṣaḍudyānāya [rākinā ]
kōḍūripolānanu koṁḍḍapalliteravudakṣaṇānanu kha 4 na 10
tū¨rpuna buḍumēṟu dakṣaṇānu tāḍēpallipolamē
ra gaṭṭupaḍumaṭa velaṁgalēṭi polamēragaṭṭu Uttarāna kō
ṟuvēIṭi rēvaḍigaruvuna tāḍēpalli teruvutū¨rpuna Āṟu
lu Uttarānaku vāṁgusīma tū¨rpuku Eṟa
ḍḍanagari dakṣaṇānakunnu vāṁgēsīma . vasaṁta
vasaṁtarāyalakṣmīnṛsiṁhyāsyamu
da hyavāyi grāmēṣu sa¨rvvē ṣvapikoṁḍḍapallēḥ khalēkha
la rakamātradhānyaṁ . koṁḍḍapallimodalaina
lanaḍumu gollapūṁḍikoṟūru velaṁgalēṟu yīla
prōlu modalaina rācaŪḷānu nāyaṁkaṟavaṭlu
nu Agrahārālānu ka navanyatūmistimi Īdha¨rmma
mu celliṁccinavāṁḍu sakaladha¨rmamulāṁ boṁdduvāṁḍu
Idi trōcinavāṁḍu brahmahatyagōhatyalu modalaina pā
takālaṁ bōvuvāṁḍu . yō dēvasya vasaṁtarāyanṛharē ste
kṛtāṁ rājabhiḥ kṣētrādīṁ npunaruddharē tsukṛ dadhistasyāṁghriṁ [ A
ti ] śubhaṁ dhattē mū¨rdhni . likānanasathāsēkā¨rthavāḥ khaṁḍḍikākhyadvi
vikhaḥnaḥ kulāṁbudhiśaśī śrīśiṁganāmāsudhī .
Note:—Below this is engraved the head of a male person.
Digital edition of SII 10.563 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
